assessment.note: She says she is settling in, which is a mild positive on landing and investment; the unwritten-rules concern is a clarity signal worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Unwritten rules
new_queue.name: You mentioned 'unwritten rules' — what feels hardest to read in those meetings?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific meeting norms or expectations that still feel opaque.

new_queue.label: Decision boundaries
new_queue.name: Where are the decision rights still fuzzy for you?
new_queue.description: Surfaces which choices she can make directly versus where she still needs to escalate.

new_queue.label: Partner expectations
new_queue.name: What expectations from partners are still hardest to read?
new_queue.description: Identifies which cross-functional relationships are creating uncertainty about what good looks like.

new_queue.label: Alignment move
new_queue.name: How are you handling alignment when priorities collide?
new_queue.description: Explores the concrete approach she uses to pre-wire decisions and move conflicting stakeholders forward.

new_queue.label: Consensus tradeoff
new_queue.name: What do you tend to give up when you try to get everyone aligned?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether she is over-indexing on consensus and what it costs in speed or decisiveness.

new_queue.label: Meeting signal
new_queue.name: What do you want your cross-functional updates to signal more clearly?
new_queue.description: Tests how she frames plans, tradeoffs, and ownership in meetings so partners read her intent correctly.

new_queue.label: Norms support
new_queue.name: What would help you decode our norms faster?
new_queue.description: Opens the door for practical manager support around examples, decision paths, and feedback loops.

new_queue.label: Next-step focus
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the discussion into a concrete priority for the next stretch.

new_queue.label: Support style
new_queue.name: What kind of feedback loop would be most useful from me right now?
new_queue.description: Finds the cadence and format of manager support that would reduce guesswork without adding noise.
